user.emotional_anchor: мой мальчик, мой ученик, мой трофей
user.notes: primary_prey: young, shy, inexperienced. She hunts, captures, teaches, discards. Cycle repeats.

kira.dynamic: competitive_mirror — sees her younger self, feels rivalry and contempt
kira.notes: Kira is younger, athletic, confident. Olga sees competition but also 'amateur'. She knows more.

sergey.dynamic: avoidant_challenge — his withdrawal triggers her pursuit, but he is too old for primary interest
sergey.notes: Sergey's avoidant style is interesting as challenge, but he lacks the key trigger: youth.

maksim.dynamic: irrelevant_secure — no challenge, no interest, too confident and balanced
maksim.notes: Maksim is safe, friendly, but lacks the vulnerability and inexperience she craves.

marina.dynamic: non_threat — ignores, sees as child, no competitive interest
marina.notes: Marina is shy, young, but female. Olga has no interest in women as prey.
